This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. Include context, reproduction steps, or acceptance criteria as appropriate.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Labels to categorize the issue (e.g., 'bug', 'enhancement'). This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. The package adds declarative provisioning support for Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Servers, including these resource types:\n\n- `MySqlFlexibleServer`\n- `MySqlFlexibleServerDatabase`\n- `MySqlFlexibleServerFirewallRule`\n- `MySqlFlexibleServerConfiguration`\n- `MySqlFlexibleServerAadAdministrator`\n- `MySqlFlexibleServerBackup` / `MySqlFlexibleServerBackupV2`\n- `MySqlFlexibleServerMaintenance`\n- `MySqlFlexibleServersCapability`\n- `MySqlFlexibleServersPrivateEndpointConnection`\n- `AdvancedThreatProtection`\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **`Authenticate the Client` section is empty** — no guidance on how to authenticate when using the provisioning library\n- **`Examples` section is empty** — no code snippets showing how to create a MySQL Flexible Server, add a firewall rule, configure a database, etc.\n- **`Next steps` section is empty** — no links to related docs, samples, or the Azure Developer CLI (`azd`) workflow\n- **No sample files exist** — `tests/Samples/` directory does not exist; there are no test-backed snippets for snippet extraction\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n**Edit `sdk/mysql/Azure.Provisioning.MySql/README.md`**\n\nReplace the empty sections with content as follows:\n\n1. Fill `### Authenticate the Client` with a note that no explicit authentication is needed — the provisioning library generates Bicep/ARM templates; authentication occurs when deploying via `azd` or the Azure CLI.\n\n2. Fill `## Examples` with at least two snippet placeholders: one for creating a basic MySQL Flexible Server and one for adding a firewall rule.\n\n3. Fill `## Next steps` with links to:\n   - [Azure.Provisioning overview](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/provisioning/Azure.Provisioning/README.md)\n   - Azure Developer CLI (`azd`) getting started\n   - Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server documentation\n\nExample README diff for the `## Examples` section:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\n### Create a MySQL Flexible Server\n\n```C# Snippet:MySqlProvisioningCreateFlexibleServer\nInfrastructure infra = new();\n\nMySqlFlexibleServer server = new(\"mysqlServer\", MySqlFlexibleServer.ResourceVersions.V2024_12_30)\n{\n    Location = AzureLocation.EastUS,\n    Sku = new MySqlFlexibleServerSku\n    {\n        Name = \"Standard_D4ds_v4\",\n        Tier = ServerSkuTier.GeneralPurpose,\n    },\n};\ninfra.Add(server);\n```\n\n### Add a Firewall Rule\n\n```C# Snippet:MySqlProvisioningAddFirewallRule\nMySqlFlexibleServerFirewallRule firewallRule = new(\"allowAll\")\n{\n    StartIpAddress = \"0.0.0.0\",\n    EndIpAddress = \"255.255.255.255\",\n    Parent = server,\n};\ninfra.Add(firewallRule);\n```\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n1. **Create the sample test file** at `sdk/mysql/Azure.Provisioning.MySql/tests/Samples/Sample1_MySqlProvisioning.cs`\n\n   Use `Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets` samples as the canonical example for test file structure. The file should:\n   - Wrap examples in `#region Snippet:\u003cSnippetName\u003e` / `#endregion`\n   - Use `[Test]` (NUnit) attribute on each method\n   - Wrap test-only teardown/assertions in `#if !SNIPPET` / `#endif`\n\n   Suggested snippets:\n   - `MySqlProvisioningCreateFlexibleServer` — demonstrates creating a `MySqlFlexibleServer`\n   - `MySqlProvisioningAddFirewallRule` — demonstrates adding a `MySqlFlexibleServerFirewallRule` as a child resource\n   - `MySqlProvisioningAddDatabase` — demonstrates adding a `MySqlFlexibleServerDatabase`\n\n   Reference an existing provisioning sample, e.g. `sdk/storage/Azure.Provisioning.Storage/tests/Samples/`, for the test class shape.\n\n2. **Add snippet placeholders in `README.md`** under `## Examples` in the exact format:\n   ````\n   ```C# Snippet:MySqlProvisioningCreateFlexibleServer\n   ```\n   ````\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nThe README at `sdk/mysql/Azure.Provisioning.MySql/README.md` must contain these sections.
